scripts.deploy:checks: npm ci && npm test && npm run test:integration
scripts.deploy:dev: node scripts/check-dev-env.mjs && npm run deploy:checks && npm run build && firebase deploy --only hosting,firestore:rules,firestore:indexes --project dev
scripts.deploy:prod: node scripts/check-prod-env.mjs && npm run deploy:checks && npm run build:prod && firebase deploy --only hosting,firestore:rules,firestore:indexes --project prod
scripts.deploy: echo 'Use deploy:dev or deploy:prod explicitly' && exit 1
